name: AGI-1096
description: AGI-1096 is a novel oral antioxidant and selective anti-inflammatory agent that is being developed to address the accelerated inflammation of grafted blood vessels, known as transplant arteritis, common in chronic organ transplant rejection.
mechanismOfAction: AGI-1096 is a novel phenolic intracellular antioxidant with anti-inflammatory and antiproliferative properties.
